data.content: Handoff capsule for a89b planning: implement in a dedicated git worktree on a short-lived local branch, run `bun install --frozen-lockfile`, then keep the fix Codex-specific. Main targets are `src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts`, `src/lib/agent-adapter-normalizers.ts`, and focused tests under `src/lib/__tests__`. Use the adrian evidence that both `item/agentMessage/delta` and `item/commandExecution/outputDelta` carry text in `params.delta`; preserve `params.text` support too. Add pipeline tests for JSON-RPC delta/text variants, command outputDelta delta/text variants, and an empty reasoning regression that returns null rather than rendering `(no text)`. Run targeted tests, then lint, typecheck, unit tests, and build before integrating to remote main. No PR workflow.
